mano_cua.result_summary: 在Chrome中找到4个社交媒体图标(Twitter/Facebook/Instagram/GitHub)位于应用顶部header栏右侧。mano-cua在多级缩放(100%-250%)下反复检查图标形状比例：Twitter鸟形图标、Facebook f圆形图标、Instagram相机图标、GitHub octocat图标均未见明显压缩变形，尺寸大致一致，间距均匀。此bug标题明确指出在Firefox和Safari中出现(Socials Squashed on Firefox and Safari)，Chrome中未复现。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Social media icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub) found in top-right header bar. At multiple zoom levels in Chrome, icons appear correctly proportioned without visible compression or distortion. The bug title specifically mentions Firefox and Safari, not Chrome.
